display_name: MiniMax Hailuo-02 Video Generation model: Advanced image-to-video generation model with 768p resolution. Send a prompt with an image for image-to-video, and just a prompt for text-to-video generation.
description:
MiniMax Hailuo-02 Video Generation model: Advanced image-to-video generation model with 768p resolution. Send a prompt with an image for image-to-video, and just a prompt for text-to-video generation. 

Optional parameters:
Set Duration. Select from (6 seconds or 10 seconds) to specify video length in seconds. Set to 6 seconds as default
